name: validate-source-file: rejects file whose source: block lacks `authoritative_url`
setup:
printf 'source:
  id: src-1
  authoritative_publisher: A
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
rules: []
recommended_set: []
all_set: []
' > file.yaml
